Class Product

java.lang.Object
com.example.milestone.models.Product
@Entity public class Product extends Object
Model representing a product that is stored in the database. This class maps products to the product table with their name, description, sku number, price, quantity, and user (owner of product)

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Product()
    Default constructor.
    Product(UUID id, UUID userId, String name, String description, String sku, BigDecimal price, int quantity)
    Initializes a product with specified fields.

  • Constructor Details

    • Product

      public Product()
      Default constructor.

    • Product

      public Product(UUID id, UUID userId, String name, String description, String sku, BigDecimal price, int quantity)
      Initializes a product with specified fields.
      Parameters:
      id - unique id of product
      userId - id of user that owns product
      name - the name of product
      description - the description of product
      sku - Stock Keeping Unit code of product
      price - the price of product
      quantity - the amount of products stored

      Returns product id.
